notes: Improved web app responsiveness for arbitrary display and MFD resolutions
Correct letterboxing across arbitrary display and MFD resolutions
Fixed blue-tint appearance on LOOKOUT camera feeds
Reconnection bug fixes and startup hardening
Bug fixed where streaming would be stopped when no internet is available
Faster frame rate and smoother stream
Auto discovery of IP cameras in the network
New neural network with improved detection
Various smaller stability improvements and bug fixes
Display Argo routes, drag & drop GPX routes, route preview mode
With this update, your settings and preferences will now be saved
Automatic horizon stabilization when IMU data is available, including support for manual roll offset
Updated 3D boat picker, depth label visuals, horizon line layering, and animated wake effects
Cleaner chart presentation with reduced vector symbols and simplified styling
Improved rendering reliability across Chromium-based browsers
Internal refactors and dependency cleanup for better stability and performance

New Aerial view gives you another 3D perspective for situational awareness. Button available on the top left of the screen for split screen view. Swipe to orbit the camera around the boat
Stability option uses heading sensor IMU data to detect pitch and roll of the boat for a better augmented reality experience. Toggle on in Boat Set-up preferences
